charge.shortDescription: +1 SpD, user's next Electric move 2x power.
charge.description: Raises the user's Special Defense by 1 stage. The user's next Electric-type attack will have its power doubled; the effect ends when the user is no longer active, or after the user attempts to use any Electric-type move besides Charge, even if it is not successful.

chargebeam.shortDescription: 70% chance to raise the user's Sp. Atk by 1.
chargebeam.description: Has a 70% chance to raise the user's Special Attack by 1 stage.

charm.description: Lowers the target's Attack by 2 stages.

chatter.description: Has a 100% chance to confuse the target.

chillingwater.shortDescription: 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1.
chillingwater.description: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.

chillyreception.description: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Snow. The user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if there are no unfainted party members.

chipaway.shortDescription: Ignores the target's stat stage changes.
chipaway.description: Ignores the target's stat stage changes, including evasiveness.

chloroblast.description: If this move is successful, the user loses 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded up, unless the user has the Magic Guard Ability.
